profile.name: Dr. Dima Abu Baker
profile.headline: Advancing dental education through innovative teaching methods
profile.bio: I'm Dr. Dima Abu Baker — I conduct research in dental education, prosthodontics, and patient care. My work focuses on improving teaching methodologies and patient outcomes in dentistry.

_hiring_disabled.title: Open to Collaboration & Hiring
_hiring_disabled.description: I'm actively seeking research collaborators, postdoctoral fellows, and motivated graduate students interested in human-computer interaction, accessibility, and reproducible research methods. If you share a passion for inclusive design and rigorous experimentation, let's build something meaningful together.

_lab_disabled.title: Advanced Systems & Learning Lab
_lab_disabled.description: Our lab focuses on building usable systems, publishing reproducible work, and designing responsibly. We explore the intersection of human-computer interaction, machine learning, and accessibility to solve real-world problems. We prioritize hands-on projects, rigorous experiments, and open-source contributions.

_projects_disabled.title: Assistive UX Toolkit
_projects_disabled.subtitle: Tooling & patterns for inclusive interfaces
_projects_disabled.description: A toolkit for designers & developers to build accessible UI components and test assistive workflows.

_projects_disabled.title: Repro Pipelines
_projects_disabled.subtitle: Workflows for reproducible experiments
_projects_disabled.description: Automated scripts and containerized environments that make experiments reproducible.

_projects_disabled.title: Study Portal
_projects_disabled.subtitle: Participant recruitment & consent
_projects_disabled.description: A secure, privacy-preserving portal to manage research participants and consent forms.

teaching.title: Prosthodontics Laboratory
teaching.description: Hands-on laboratory course covering complete denture fabrication, partial dentures, and prosthodontic techniques. Students develop practical skills through live demonstrations and video-recorded instructions.

teaching.title: Advanced Prosthodontics
teaching.description: Advanced study of prosthodontic principles, including complex cases, implant-supported prostheses, and modern digital impression techniques for palatal defects and challenging anatomies.

teaching.title: Complete Denture Prosthodontics
teaching.description: Comprehensive study of complete denture design, fabrication, and patient management. Covers material selection, including comparisons of acrylic resin versus metal palatal bases.

teaching.title: Clinical Research Methods in Dentistry
teaching.description: Research methodology for dental education and clinical trials. Covers experimental design, randomized controlled trials, patient-reported outcomes, and statistical analysis.

experience.title: Faculty Member
experience.organization: University of Jordan — School of Dentistry
experience.description: Teaching prosthodontics courses and conducting research in dental education methodologies and patient outcomes.

experience.title: Clinical Instructor
experience.organization: University of Jordan — Dental Teaching Clinics
experience.description: Supervised undergraduate and graduate students in prosthodontic clinical procedures and patient care.

experience.title: Visiting Researcher
experience.organization: University of Manchester — School of Dentistry
experience.description: Collaborated on research investigating digital impression techniques for complex palatal defects.

education.title: Master's in Clinical Dentistry in Prosthodontics
education.description: Specialized postgraduate training in prosthodontics, advanced dental materials, and evidence-based clinical practice.

education.title: Doctor of Dental Surgery
education.description: Comprehensive dental education covering all aspects of general dentistry, clinical practice, and patient care.
